title: KB Routing Sessions Dataset
description: Multi-turn sessions for evaluating KB source selection in a multi-source agent.

session_type.description: Routing pattern for the session. DOCS = all turns expect docs KB; GRAPH = all turns expect KG; MIXED = turns route to different sources; BOTH = all turns accept either/both sources; NONE = no KB lookup expected for any turn.

description.description: Human-readable description of the session's intent and content.

n_turns.description: Number of turns in this session. Must equal the length of the turns array.

question.description: The user's question as it would appear in the chat.

expected.description: Which source(s) the agent should use. DOCS = documentation KB; GRAPH = KG action groups (SPARQL); BOTH = either is acceptable or both should be used; REDIRECT = agent should navigate via redirect action; NONE = no KB lookup expected (agent should answer from general knowledge or decline).

notes.description: Optional reasoning for why this question maps to the expected KB source, or edge-case notes.
